---
title: "Historical Selections: A Series of Readings from the Best Authorities in English and European History. Selected and arranged by E.M. Sewell and C.M. Yonge"
---

## Historical Selections: A Series of Readings from the Best Authorities in English and European History. Selected and arranged by E.M. Sewell and C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1868
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history (by others)
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan and Company

### Notes

Probably the earliest instance of CMY’s name being attached to one of her published works.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
